title: Bundle sweep 5: single-engine total=4 same=2 reverse-hash
methodology: Changed the instruction bundler to flush after 4 total ops and 2 ops on one engine, with single-engine bundles. Also reversed hash stage order to probe correctness/throughput tradeoffs.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Anthropic Performance Takehome (perf-takehome). Building on exp-001-baseline-unoptimized by changing bundle packing policy.
